_comment: Maps pret map-filename (CamelCase, no .asm extension) to our (map_key, location_key). One pret file → one location. Multi-floor/multi-part locations (e.g., SilphCo1F..11F → silph-co) are all folded into the same location_key. Unmapped entries are intentional (interior NPC houses, gates, etc. that we don't track as separate locations).
